articles.title: U.S. stock futures are flat after Dow record close on U.S.-Iran deal; SpaceX rallies again: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed to new intraday and closing records on a potential deal between the U.S. and Iran.

articles.title: Micron Stock Rises Toward New High and Could Reach This Level - Barron's
articles.description: Micron stock is setting records and Wall Street is racing to raise price targets for the memory-chip maker.

articles.title: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion - CNBC
articles.description: Yum Brands is selling Pizza Hut, capping off years of struggles for the pizza chain.

articles.title: Stock Market Today: SpaceX Set to Overtake Amazon by Market Cap — Live Updates - WSJ
Is it a renter's market? It depends on where you live - NPR
articles.description: About 40% of rentals on Zillow offer move-in deals, like a month of free rent, thanks to a construction boom that created an apartment surplus in some parts of the United States.

articles.title: Fox enters new era with Roku deal - Axios
articles.description: The merger would make Fox the owner of the top digital TV operating system in the U.S.

articles.title: Republicans hopeful Iran deal could stop the pain at the pump — but it may be too late - Politico
articles.description: Even if gas prices ease, some Republicans, including those close to the White House, fear that voter perceptions of a sour economy are already baked in.

articles.title: All eyes turn to Fed chair Kevin Warsh and his first moves on interest rates - AP News
articles.description: Ever since Kevin Warsh was nominated by President Trump in late January to lead the Federal Reserve, a question has lingered: Will he seek to raise interest rates to tame inflation or cut them as Trump has long demanded? On Wednesday, Warsh may provide the fi…

articles.title: China’s Consumer Spending Falls for First Time Since Covid - WSJ

articles.description: Audited figures reveal mounting costs from model development, infrastructure and rapid expansion

articles.title: Elon Musk Now Has About $1 Trillion More Than the Next Richest Person in the World - Gizmodo
articles.description: He could lose almost $1 trillion and still be the richest person in the world.

articles.title: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5 - The Verge
articles.description: Anthropic received a US export control directive Friday “to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national,” kicking off a weekend of chaos.

articles.title: Trump promised to bring order to AI oversight. That lasted 2 weeks. - Politico
articles.description: New restrictions on Anthropic are causing industry advocates to worry the White House’s plan for a laissez-faire approach to the technology is crumbling.

articles.title: Health Insurer Centene Offers Most Staff Buyouts After Membership Losses - Bloomberg
articles.description: Centene Corp. will offer buyouts to most employees to cut expenses after membership in its health insurance plans dropped substantially over the last year, according to a company spokesperson.

articles.title: Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger Has State AGs Seeing More Than Just Antitrust Issues - Deadline
articles.description: In a tough election year for incumbents, Paramount’s $111B acquisition of WBD has become a political football in California and across the nation.
